title: Alpha and bata food system
description: bring the old food system back
body:
![  ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/516004cacc145dab02df6714c777f582565de7ae.png)

 Now you dont have food bar and the food will directly regenerate your health
 
different foods will give you different amount of health

But like in the old versions of minecraft **You can eat when you have full health**
